contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.

Definition DecidableFanTheorem (A : Type) :=
  forall (B : list A -> Type)
  (dec : forall l : list A, Decidable (B l))
  (bar : IsBar B),
  IsUniformBar B.

Definition MonotoneFanTheorem (A : Type) :=
  forall (B : list A -> Type)
  (mon : IsMonotone B)
  (bar : IsBar B),
  IsUniformBar B.

Definition FanTheorem (A : Type) :=
  forall (B : list A -> Type)
  (bar : IsBar B),
  IsUniformBar B.

goals.conclusion: forall s : nat -> Empty, {n : nat & (n <= 0) * B (list_restrict s n)}

contents: Definition fantheorem_contr (A : Type) `{Contr A} : FanTheorem A.

goals.conclusion: forall s : nat -> A, {n : nat & (n <= (bB c).1) * B (list_restrict s n)}

contents: assert (p : forall n : nat, list_restrict s n = list_restrict c n).

goals.conclusion: forall n : nat, list_restrict s n = list_restrict c n

hypotheses.type: forall n : nat, list_restrict s n = list_restrict c n

goals.conclusion: forall n : nat, list_restrict s n = list_restrict c n
list_restrict s n = list_restrict c n
length (list_restrict s n) = length (list_restrict c n)

forall (n0 : nat) (H : n0 < length (list_restrict s n)),
nth' (list_restrict s n) n0 H =
nth' (list_restrict c n) n0 (transport (lt n0) ?p H)

forall (n0 : nat) (H : n0 < length (list_restrict s n)),
nth' (list_restrict s n) n0 H =
nth' (list_restrict c n) n0
  (transport (lt n0)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (fun n1 : nat => n1 = length (list_restrict c n))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (fun n1 : nat => n = n1) 1
           (length_list_restrict c n))
        (length_list_restrict s n))
     H)

nth' (list_restrict s n) m h =
nth' (list_restrict c n) m
  (transport (lt m)
     (internal_paths_rew_r (fun n0 : nat => n0 = length (list_restrict c n))
        (internal_paths_rew_r (fun n0 : nat => n = n0) 1
           (length_list_restrict c n))
        (length_list_restrict s n))
     h)

contents: (** The family we use when applying the fan theorem in our proof that continuity implies uniform continuity. *)

Definition uc_theorem_family {A : Type} (p : (nat -> A) -> Bool)
  : list A -> Type
  := fun l =>
      forall (u v : nat -> A) (h : list_restrict u (length l) = l)
        (h' : list_restrict v (length l) = l), p u = p v.

hypotheses.type: forall v : nat -> A, s =[n] v -> p s =[0] p v
forall v : nat -> A, s =[n] v -> p s =[0] p v
forall v0 : nat -> A, s =[n] v0 -> p s =[0] p v0
list_restrict u (length (list_restrict s n)) = list_restrict s n
list_restrict v (length (list_restrict s n)) = list_restrict s n
forall v0 : nat -> A, s =[n] v0 -> p s =[0] p v0
list_restrict s n = list_restrict u (length (list_restrict s n))
list_restrict s n = list_restrict v (length (list_restrict s n))
forall v0 : nat -> A, s =[n] v0 -> p s =[0] p v0
list_restrict s n = list_restrict u n
list_restrict s n = list_restrict v n
forall v0 : nat -> A, s =[n] v0 -> p s =[0] p v0

contents: (** The fan theorem implies that every continuous function is uniformly continuous. The current proof uses the full fan theorem. Less powerful versions might be enough. *)

Definition uniform_continuity_fantheorem {A : Type} (fan : FanTheorem A)
  (p : (nat -> A) -> Bool) (c : IsContinuous p)
  : uniformly_continuous p.
pose proof (fan' := fan (uc_theorem_family p) (is_bar_uc_theorem_family p c)).

hypotheses.type:
forall s : nat -> A,
{n0 : nat & (n0 <= n) * uc_theorem_family p (list_restrict s n0)}
